name: Ebanx
description: Ebanx — LatAm payment processing platform covering Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, Chile, and 15+ countries with local payment methods.

seo.title: Ebanx — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Ebanx: Ebanx — LatAm payment processing platform covering Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, Chile, and 15+ countries with local payment methods.

when_to_use: PIX, boleto, and card acceptance for Brazil e-commerce and SaaS
Local payment method processing across Mexico, Argentina, Chile via one API
Cross-border USD/EUR settlement for global companies with LatAm customers
Localized checkout for digital businesses entering 15+ LatAm countries

review.verdict: Proven LatAm gateway for enterprises — serious alternative to dLocal if you need reliability at scale.
review.best_for: Global enterprises selling cross-border into LatAm consumer markets
review.not_for: LatAm-local SMBs better served by country-specific gateways

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down
